headline: Stephens & Co. Reinstates Overweight on PNC Financial Services Gr, Announces $265 Price Target
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Matt Olney   reinstates PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Overweight and announces $265 price target.
